title: ElevenReader 出版：轻松创作你的专属有声读物 | ElevenLabs
author: ElevenLabs Blog
content:
Less than 5% of books are released as audiobooks. A staggering number of stories remain unheard. Why? Because traditional audiobook production can be slow, complex, and prohibitively expensive.

Today that changes with ElevenReader Publishing.

Every day, listeners around the globe tune in to hear books, articles, and PDFs read aloud with the ElevenReader app. Over the past few months, we partnered with leading publications and influential thought leaders — from MIT Tech Review to Andrew Huberman, Arianna Huffington and more — as well as independent authors to give their writing a voice through the app.

Now we’re opening ElevenReader Publishing to everyone. It’s the fastest, zero-cost way to convert your book into a professional-grade audiobook with built-in distribution on the ElevenReader iOS and Android app.

Introducing ElevenReader Publishing

ElevenReader Publishing uses ElevenLabs AI audio models to generate realistic, versatile and contextually-aware speech.

This program lets authors bring their stories to life with the highest quality AI voice narration—ready in minutes and at no cost.

How it works

We redesigned the audio publishing experience from start to finish. Here’s how you can get started:

  • Import your book as an ePub, docx, or PDF and format your text (currently limited to English only books with 31 additional languages coming soon)
  • Preview your audio in seconds on the ElevenReader app, voiced by any of thousands of AI voices
  • Publish your audiobook for approved distribution on the ElevenReader app globally
  • Give your listeners a personalized experience as users can select their preferred voices from within the app 
  • Get in-depth audience insights with listener reporting and analytics 
  • Join our beta program to earn payouts and royalties of $1.10 for every listener who engages with your work for more than 11 minutes (currently limited to US residents only due to tax requirements)
  • Maintain your IP with no exclusivity restrictions. Your work remains yours. There are no exclusivity restrictions by joining our program.  

Looking to produce audiobooks with even more customization and audio exports for added distribution?

Authors can use Studio, our premium audio suite, for fine-grained voice customization, pacing control, and multi-speaker selection. We recently announced that authors can now export their fully-produced audio files directly to Spotify through our partnership with Findaway Voices by Spotify. 

What authors are saying

With ElevenReader, you can now discover hundreds of published works from authors around the globe. Independent authors and publishers can now go direct and bring immersive audio to their readers like never before.

Hear what authors are saying about ElevenReader: 

“For the first time, readers are in control of how they want to hear their audiobooks. The ElevenReader app allows listeners to customize their audiobook experience and bring an author's stories to life in the most meaningful way for them. And what’s even better is that the quality of the audiobooks are superior to anything else on the market.” - Leeanna Morgan, USA Today Best-Selling Author

“I've written over 65 books in my career. ElevenReader transforms my written works into lifelike audio. It lets me make more audio stories available and gives listeners a truly unique experience.” - Joseph Nassise, New York Times Best-Selling Author 

“I was initially skeptical about AI audiobooks. After testing ElevenLabs’ quality, my doubts vanished. I have been exceptionally pleased with the result. If you're serious about audiobooks, do yourself a favor, take action now, and start with ElevenLabs.” - E.S. Martell, Award-Winning Science Fiction Author

Get started today

We believe great stories deserve to be heard. The ElevenReader Publishing program marks a major step in ensuring independent authors and publishers can produce high-quality audiobooks that reach listeners everywhere.

We can’t wait to hear what stories you’ll create and share with ElevenReader Publishing.

Get started and create your first audiobook with ElevenReader Publishing or discover your next favorite audiobook on the free ElevenReader app today.
aiSummary: ElevenLabs 推出 ElevenReader 出版，使作者能够以零成本快速将书籍转换为高质量 AI 有声读物，并在其应用上发布。
oneSentenceSummary: ElevenLabs 推出 ElevenReader 出版，使作者能够以零成本快速将书籍转换为高质量 AI 有声读物，并在其应用上发布。
summary: ElevenLabs 推出 ElevenReader 出版平台，旨在革新有声读物制作流程。作者可以导入书籍（目前仅限英语，即将支持 31 种语言），利用 ElevenLabs 的 AI 语音模型快速生成高质量有声读物，并发布到 ElevenReader 应用。作者可以获得受众分析，并通过 Beta 计划获得收益。ElevenReader 出版维护作者的知识产权，作者还可以使用 ElevenLabs Studio 进行高级自定义，并通过与 Findaway Voices 的合作将音频文件导出到 Spotify。该计划以更快速、经济的方案颠覆传统有声读物制作模式。

mainPoints.point: ElevenReader 出版极大简化了有声读物的创作和分发过程。
mainPoints.explanation: 作者可以快速且经济高效地将书籍转换为有声读物，并在 ElevenReader 应用上发布，从而消除了复杂的传统制作流程。

mainPoints.point: ElevenLabs 的 AI 语音技术显著降低有声读物制作门槛，并提供高质量、个性化的听觉体验。
mainPoints.explanation: ElevenLabs 的人工智能语音模型生成逼真且多样化的语音，为听众提供定制的听觉体验。

mainPoints.point: 作者可根据听众参与度获得收益，且 ElevenReader 出版不限制作者的 IP 知识产权。
mainPoints.explanation: 通过测试计划，作者可以根据听众的参与度获得收益，并且 ElevenReader 出版不限制作者的知识产权。

mainPoints.point: ElevenReader 出版助力独立作者和出版商触达更广泛受众。
mainPoints.explanation: 它打破了传统出版模式的局限性，为独立创作者提供了更轻松地制作和分发有声读物的工具。

keyQuotes: 读者现在可以自主选择有声读物的收听方式。
ElevenReader 将我的文字作品转化为生动逼真的音频，让我能创作更多有声故事，为听众带来独一无二的体验。
起初我对 AI 有声读物持怀疑态度，但在体验 ElevenLabs 的质量后，疑虑一扫而空。
